name: Block Visibility Groups
description: Allows the site administrator to easily manage complex visibility settings that apply to any block placed in a visibility group.

suggests.drupal/ctools: Provides various additional condition plugins including entity bundle conditions.
suggests.drupal/menu_condition: Adds a condition based on menu position.
suggests.drupal/term_condition: Adds a condition checking whether the current node has a specific taxonomy term.
suggests.drupal/token_conditions: Adds a simple token-matching condition plugin.
